sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 253 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.22 2. For orders on CMA No.393/2019 3. For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel this reference application has been filed against the order on rectification application and is not maintainable. He states that the reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
